_comment: Google Calendar MCP per-bot template. Replace {BOT_NAME} with anya/anna/bella/etc. Each bot binds to ONE owner's Google account via their own credentials.json + token directory. Do NOT share credentials across bots.
_first_run: After dropping credentials.json into the path above, run: GOOGLE_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS=<path> GOOGLE_CALENDAR_MCP_TOKEN_PATH=<token_path> /home/oldrabbit/.npm-global/bin/google-calendar-mcp auth — complete OAuth in browser, token will be cached.
